name: Soda Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and baking powder in a bowl.
2. Add the butter and mix until crumbly.
3. Gradually add the liquid and mix with a knife until a dough forms.
4. Form the dough into four pieces.
5. Roll each piece out to 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Cut with a biscuit or cookie cutter (2-inch diameter).
7. Place the cutouts on a baking sheet.
8. Prick each cracker several times with a fork.
9. Sprinkle lightly with salt, according to taste.
10. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown. Turn once if necessary and watch carefully.
